---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?
Why is the current behavior not enough?

## Proposed Solution

How should the new feature work?
Describe it as clearly as possible.

## Use Case

Give a real example of when and how you would use this feature.

## Alternatives Considered

Did you think of any other approaches?
Why is your proposed solution better?

## Priority

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important for usability
- [ ] Critical — blocking me from using the app

## Additional Context

Add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other apps if helpful.
